tagline: I develop robust, high-performance web applications, from responsive design to server-side architecture. I specialize in Nuxt 4, Vue.js, and AdonisJS.
ensemble: I’m passionate about the JavaScript ecosystem and system administration, and I enjoy designing seamless tools optimized for SEO and continuous deployment. My goal is to combine the responsiveness of the front end with the robustness of a well-architected back end.
